originalTitle: Building a PC to BEAT the STEAM Machine!
content: Check out AppControl today to identify whatever is gunking up your system. Grab it for free here: https://www.appcontrol.com/ Signup for Floatplane and get exclusive Lime Day deals at: WW: https://global.lttstore.com/collections/lime-day US:https://www.lttstore.com/collections/lime-day The Steam Machine is pricey, but can you build a better performing system for the same money? (spoilers: yes) We’re building a DIY PC that crushes the competition in raw performance. You’ll lose a few console conveniences, but gain total upgradeability. See the parts list which we have linked below to get started! Join the conversation on the forum: https://linustechtips.com/topic/1639845-building-a-pc-to-beat-the-steam-machine/ AMD Ryzen 5 7500F: https://geni.us/lGLHy ASUS TUF B850M-E Motherboard: https://geni.us/BlTUnz Kingston Fury Beast 16GB (2x8GB) DDR5: https://prsm2.com/vDxWD9z_X Sapphire Pulse 9060XT 16gb: https://geni.us/BP6Z ADATA Legend 710 512gb: https://prsm2.com/p-AjUPbAV Cooler Master MasterBox Q300L Case: https://prsm2.com/l-ShGuu0R Cooler Master Hyper EVO 212 Halo: https://geni.us/at5R7A MSI Mag A650BN PSU: https://geni.us/Lo4J8L9 Flydigi Vader 5 Pro: https://geni.us/ZrUiGn Don't forget our Channel Partners: Secretlab - Secure a TITAN Evo ergonomic seat: https://lmg.gg/secretlabltt PIA - Access our preferred VPN: https://www.piavpn.com/ltt dbrand - Grab a "Circuit" skin for your tech: https://dbrand.com/pcb ► LTT STORE: https://lttstore.com ► FLOATPLANE EXCLUSIVES: https://lmg.gg/lttfloatplane ► LTT LABS: https://lmg.gg/labs ► PARTNERSHIPS: https://lmg.gg/partners Purchases via select links may support Linus Media Group. Affiliate tech provided by https://affilimate.com/?aid=ghz1izbpb Linus Sebastian holds investments in Framework Computer, Inc and HexOS by Eshtek.
